title: Multiple Failed Logins
description: Multiple failed login attempts detected on WIN-01 from IP 192.168.1.45. This could indicate a brute force attack.
fullLog: Event ID 4625: An account failed to log on. Account Name: admin. Failure Reason: Unknown user name or bad password.

title: Suspicious PowerShell Command
description: Encoded PowerShell command detected on WIN-02. EncodedCommand execution is often used to obfuscate malicious activity.
fullLog: Event ID 4104: EncodedCommand detected in PowerShell execution. Command: powershell.exe -EncodedCommand JABjAGwAaQBlAG4AdAAgAD0AIABOAGUAdw...

title: New Admin Account Created
description: A new user account was created and immediately added to the Administrators group on WIN-03. This could indicate privilege escalation.
fullLog: Event ID 4720: A user account 'backup_admin' was created. Subject: SYSTEM. Event ID 4732: User 'backup_admin' was added to Administrators group.
